title: trifolium michelianum subsp. angulatum
intro: Trifolium michelianum subsp. angulatum, also known as the Angle Clover or Sharp-leaved Clover, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family and is native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Trifolium michelianum subsp. angulatum are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
